went_well: The static-client authority boundary is recorded as P0 local deterministic/export-import, P1 RLS-protected profiles after demand, and P2 authoritative invite-only rooms.
The decision record preserves the measured local replay evidence and separates it from unsupported anti-cheat claims.
went_wrong: Blender MCP and headless Blender were unavailable, so no mesh or rigging evidence can be carried into production claims.
Existing resources have incomplete method history and cannot be retroactively certified against the new visual/audio policy.

metrics.name: official_source_links
metrics.method: Supabase, Cloudflare Durable Objects, and MDN links in the decision record Sources section

improvement_actions.action: Before the next sprite batch, record a source-approved PerfectPixel 16 fps production sheet with method version, frame count, approval, and output paths.
